news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) disclosed that the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors had authorized the issuance of non-qualified stock options for the acquisition of 124,950 shares of its common stock. Additionally, they approved the granting of 84,725 restricted stock unit ("RSU") awards to 26 new non-executive staff. These awards were provided under the Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan (the “2021 Inducement Plan”) as essential inducements for these employees joining the company, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals granted 124,950 stock options and 84,725 RSU awards to 26 new employees on April 10, 2025.
Goodfellow's Q1 results for the period ending Feb 28, 2025 are out; details available.

news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a prominent global security products and solutions company, has revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.51 per ordinary share. This dividend will be paid out on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 13, 2025. Allegion, traded as NYSE: ALLE, focuses on creating and producing cutting-edge security and access solutions to ensure safety in various environments like residences, educational institutions, workplaces, and connectivity spaces.
news.headline: Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) declares $0.51 quarterly dividend per share, payable on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 13, 2025.

news.summary: Bayer AG's Vitrakvi (larotrectinib) has received full approval from the U.S. Food And Drug Administration (FDA) for adult and pediatric patients with solid tumors containing the neurotrophic receptor tyrosine kinase (NTRK) gene fusion. The drug has shown significant and lasting responses in a range of NTRK fusion-positive solid tumors. Initially granted accelerated approval in November 2018, Vitrakvi's full approval marks a milestone in its efficacy for patients. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.
news.headline: FDA grants full approval to Bayer's Vitrakvi for NTRK fusion-positive solid tumors. Previously given accelerated approval in 2018.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Mattr Corp. (TSX: MATR) announced it will hold its Annual Meeting on May 15, 2025, at 2:00pm EDT. The meeting will be conducted in a hybrid format at the Marriott Markham, Ontario, and online via live webcast at https://meetings.lumiconnect.com/400-728-282-283. Shareholders can attend, ask questions, and vote in real-time. Registered shareholders can vote before the meeting using methods in the Circular or proxy forms. Questions can be submitted in advance to meghan.maceachern@mattr.com.
news.headline: Mattr Corp. announces its Annual Meeting on May 15, 2025 at 2:00pm EDT, in hybrid format at Marriott Markham.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.7%, the lowest rate in the past decade. This signifies a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The report also indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations. These numbers point towards a strong and growing job market, with various sectors experiencing growth and contributing to the overall positive trend in employment. This decrease in unemployment and increase in job creation are positive indicators for the country's economic health and stability.
news.headline: Outcome of board members election at yearly investors' assembly.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Bloomfield, Connecticut, The Cigna Group partnered with basketball icon Earvin "Magic" Johnson to organize a Bright Futures Carnival for children affected by the Southern California wildfires. The event, held for Boys & Girls Club of Pasadena kids, aimed to support local communities.
news.headline: Cigna Group and Magic Johnson partner for carnival to help S. California wildfire victims.

news.summary: The state known for its motto "Live Free or Die" is moving towards accepting Bitcoin with the recent passing of a reserve bill by the House of Representatives. This development brings the state closer to integrating the cryptocurrency into its financial systems.
news.headline: NH House passes bill to create state Bitcoin reserve. Embracing crypto, state takes a step forward with House voting in favor.

news.summary: Today, Mohegan Tribal Gaming Authority revealed the issuance of $1.2 billion in new secured notes as part of a larger refinancing effort. This move marks the initial phase of anticipated transactions to secure better financial standing.
news.headline: Mohegan closes $1.2B in secured notes issuance for refinancing; part of larger transactions.

news.summary: Evolent Health, Inc. (NYSE: EVH), a firm dedicated to improving health outcomes for individuals with complex conditions, is set to take part in forthcoming conferences. The company, headquartered in Washington, shared plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. This news came on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Evolent Health (NYSE: EVH) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. Focus on better health outcomes. Company participating in upcoming conferences.

news.summary: TETRA Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:TTI) based in The Woodlands, Texas, shared plans to unveil its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes post-market closure on April 29, 2025. Subsequently, on April 30, 2025, the Company is set to conduct a conference to delve into the results further.
news.headline: TETRA Technologies, Inc. will release Q1 2025 results on April 29, 2025, followed by a conference call on April 30, 2025.

news.summary: Jennifer Goforth, Board Chair for I-CAR, declared the appointment of Kyle G. Thompson as the new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) & President, starting May 5, 2025. This news was disclosed from Hoffman Estates, Ill., on April 10, 2025, via PRNewswire. Thompson will be taking over the position from John S. Van.
news.headline: I-CAR appoints new CEO Kyle Thompson as John Van Alstyne retires after 15 years; effective May 5, 2025.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 10, 2025, Firan Technology Group Corporation (TSX: FTG) (OTCQX: FTGFF) shared the outcome of its yearly general meeting of shareholders ("AGM"). The event took place in Toronto, Ontario, on the same day. FTG confirmed that all five director nominees outlined in its management information circular from February 28, 2025, were successfully elected as directors of the Corporation.
news.headline: FTG announces AGM results: 5 director nominees elected in Toronto on April 10, 2025. TSX: FTG, OTCQX: FTGFF.

news.summary: First Commonwealth Financial Corporation (NYSE: FCF) of Indiana, Pennsylvania, has scheduled a conference call on April 30, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss financial outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The call, to be led by President and CEO T. Michael Price, will also feature Executive VP and CFO James R. Reske, Executive VP and CRO Jane Grebenc, and Executive VP and CCO Brian J. Sohocki. Before the market opens on April 29, 2025, First Commonwealth will release a press statement detailing its First Quarter 2025 financial results.
news.headline: First Commonwealth Financial Conference Call on April 30, 2025 at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss Q1 results.

news.summary: TARRYTOWN, N.Y., April 10, 2025 - Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. disclosed plans to release its fiscal 2025 fourth quarter and full-year earnings on May 8, 2025, prior to the market opening. The company, traded on NYSE as PBH, will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to review the financial outcomes.
news.headline: Prestige Consumer Healthcare (NYSE: PBH) to report fiscal 2025 Q4 and year-end earnings on May 8, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 AM ET.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to an all-time low of 3.5%. This marks a significant decrease compared to last year when the rate was at 4.2%. The strong job market has allowed for over 250,000 new jobs to be created in the past month alone. Additionally, the average hourly earnings have increased by 3% over the previous year. These positive economic indicators point to a thriving economy and provide hope for sustained growth in the near future.
news.headline: Investor presentation webcast by Helios Fairfax Partners Cancelled due to power outage.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Clairvest Group Inc. (TSX: CVG) disclosed a recent investment alongside Clairvest Equity Partners VII (CEP VII) in NCS Engineers to aid in the company's expansion, staff advancement, and customer service. This minority equity investment marks Clairvest's initial involvement within the environmental consulting & engineering field, emphasizing their commitment to this industry over the years. This strategic move showcases their dedication to driving growth within NCS and promoting excellence in their operations.
news.headline: Clairvest, along with CEP VII, invests in NCS Engineers to support growth. First partnership in environmental sector.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) revealed their decision to distribute a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share of common stock. This dividend is set to be paid out on June 5, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded on the company's books as of April 22, 2025.
news.headline: Carpenter Technology announces $0.20 quarterly dividend per share, payable June 5, to shareholders on record by April 22.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Santa Clara, CA and Kyoto, Japan, ROHM Semiconductor announced the development of N-channel power MOSFETs with exceptional features. These MOSFETs boast industry-leading low ON-resistance and wide Safe Operating Area (SOA) capability. Specifically designed for high-performance enterprise and AI servers, these MOSFETs offer optimal power supply performance.
news.headline: ROHM creates high-power MOSFETs with low ON-resistance for enterprise and AI servers. Ideal for power supplies.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, TC Energy Corporation, which trades on the TSX and NYSE under TRP, announced their upcoming financial report for the first quarter of 2025. The results will be disclosed on May 1 at 6:30 a.m. MDT / 8:30 a.m. EDT. Additionally, the company will conduct its annual meeting for common shareholders on May 8 at 10 a.m. MDT / 12 p.m. EDT.
news.headline: TC Energy to report Q1 2025 results on May 1 at 6:30 a.m. MDT. Annual meeting for shareholders on May 8 at 10 a.m. MDT.
Fed's Collins: Financial markets performing well, continue to be liquid.

news.summary: Northwest Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN) based in Portland, Oregon, announced a quarterly dividend of 49 cents per share on its common stock. Shareholders of record as of Apr. 30, 2025, will receive the dividend on May 15, 2025. The indicated annual dividend rate for the company is $1.96 per share. NW Natural Holdings is a prominent company in the region, known for its operations in the natural gas sector.
news.headline: NW Natural Holdings declares quarterly dividend of 49 cents/share, with annual rate of $1.96. Payable on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Boston, CyberArk (NASDAQ: CYBR) revealed at its IMPACT 2025 Conference advancements in its Identity Security Platform. The updates include new solutions and features to enhance security for all types of identities - human, AI, and machine - by implementing appropriate privilege controls. These innovations provide enhanced functionality for both human and machine identities, while also extending identity security measures to AI Agents. These capabilities are now accessible through a unified platform, offering comprehensive protection.
news.headline: CyberArk enhances identity security platform for humans, AI, and machines at IMPACT 2025 Conference.
Money market fund assets fell by $25.4b to $7.01t in the week ended April 9th - ICI.

news.summary: New York-based DoubleVerify ("DV") (NYSE: DV), a prominent digital media measurement, data, and analytics software platform, disclosed that its 2025 Annual Stockholders Meeting is scheduled for May 21, 2025, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will be conducted in a virtual format only. Shareholders holding shares as of March 25, 2025, will have the opportunity to participate, vote, and engage in question-and-answer sessions through an online platform. Access to the online platform can be obtained by visiting www.virtualsha.
news.headline: DoubleVerify's 2025 Annual Virtual Meeting for Stockholders on May 21 at 10am ET in virtual format. Visit website to attend.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The number of new jobs created in the last quarter reached a record high of 300,000, exceeding all expectations. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 2.5% compared to the same period last year. These positive economic indicators have sparked optimism among analysts and policymakers, pointing towards a robust recovery in the job market.
news.headline: Sharp fluctuations in stock market due to fluctuating Trump tariffs highlight unpredictable risks.
Invest in gold for diversification, with prices reaching new highs. Consider buying gold ETFs such as GLD or IAU.

news.summary: In Los Angeles and Long Beach, California, Banc of California, a subsidiary of Banc of California, Inc. (NYSE: BANC), is excited to confirm their sponsorship of the 2025 Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach. The event will span from April 11 to April 13, in commemoration of the race's 50th anniversary. This race is a significant display of speed, accuracy, and Southern California's love for motorsport. Banc of California remains the official bank sponsor for the event.
news.headline: Banc of California sponsors 2025 Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, celebrating 50 years of racing excellence.

news.summary: Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, a leading national consumer rights law firm, is currently looking into cases concerning individuals affected by the Eisner Advisory. New York and Chicago-based, the firm is seeking contact information from individuals who believe they have been impacted. This investigation, conducted as of April 10, 2025, aims to address claims and provide legal support to those affected. If you have been impacted by the Eisner Advisory, please click the provided link to submit your contact information for further assistance.
news.headline: Data breach alert for Eisner Advisory Group, LLC; Wolf Haldenstein LLP investigating on behalf of impacted individuals.

news.summary: In Holliston, Massachusetts, on April 10, 2025, Harvard Bioscience, Inc. (Nasdaq: HBIO) shared news of Jennifer Cote's resignation as Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer. Her resignation will take effect upon the Company's filing of the Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q, anticipated on or before May 12, 2025. Mark Frost has been named as the Interim Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer following Ms. Cote’s departure.
news.headline: Harvard Bioscience CFO Jennifer Cote resigns, to be effective when Q1 report is filed by May 12, 2025. Mark Frost appointed interim CFO.

news.summary: Kilroy Realty Corporation revealed that Scott Ingraham, an independent director, is set to retire from the Board of Directors during the upcoming Annual Meeting scheduled for May 20, 2025. Ingraham, who has been on the Board since 2007 and chaired the Audit Committee since 2008, will be stepping down. The Company expressed gratitude for his substantial contributions. Kilroy Realty Corporation is listed as KRC on the NYSE.
news.headline: Kilroy Realty's Board Director Scott Ingraham to retire at Annual Meeting on May 20, 2025. Served since 2007.

news.summary: Today, sellers reentered the stock market, causing a decline in bank stocks in anticipation of upcoming earnings reports to be released on Friday. Despite this, Walmart continued to perform well. The Dow Jones Industrial Average gave back approximately one-third of its significant gains as China tariffs surged by 145%, leading to a downturn in chip and oil stocks.
news.headline: Stock market sees decline as Dow gives back a third of big gains; China tariffs at 145% impact. Chip, oil stocks suffer.

news.summary: Domino's Pizza has experienced a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. This upgrade in rating is a positive sign for investors, with the stock showing improvements. The company's RS Rating has seen an uplift, reflecting its strengthening position in the market. This development suggests favorable prospects for Domino's Pizza as it continues to demonstrate growth and potential in the industry.
news.headline: Domino's Pizza stock gets Relative Strength Rating lift, indicating improved technical performance.

news.summary: Stratasys Ltd., a pioneer in polymer 3D printing solutions, has recently finalized a significant strategic investment deal. Fortissimo Capital, a prominent private equity fund based in Israel specializing in technology and industrial investments, recently closed a $120 million investment in Stratasys. This transaction has resulted in Fortissimo acquiring around 14% of Stratasys' total ordinary shares. Through a direct purchase, Fortissimo now holds 11 million shares of the company.
news.headline: Stratasys receives $120 million investment from Fortissimo Capital, leading Israeli fund, acquiring 14% of shares.

news.summary: In the past, Netflix's stock has reacted to its quarterly reports, typically influenced by subscriber figures. However, this trend will not continue with the Q1 report as Netflix has decided to withhold specific subscriber numbers. This strategic move marks a shift in the usual pattern, keeping investors and analysts in suspense regarding this critical performance metric.
news.headline: Netflix will not disclose subscriber numbers in its Q1 report, breaking tradition of stock movement based on this data.

news.summary: Capital One Financial has displayed a positive trend in its price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating to 91. The increase in rating indicates the company's strengthening position in the market. This news highlights the improving condition of Capital One Financial's stock, reflecting its growth and potential for investors.
news.headline: Capital One Financial stock's RS rating rises to 91, showing improving price performance.

news.summary: In Portland, Maine, WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) is set to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after the market closes. The details will include a press release and supplemental materials packet discussing the company's performance during the first quarter. Investors can access this information through the investor relations section of the WEX website, www.wexinc.com, on the same afternoon of the announcement.
news.headline: WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) to release first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after market close. Find details on WEX website.

news.summary: During afternoon trading, gold futures surged by 4% to reach $3,110.50 per ounce, marking a record high. This increase is attributed to ongoing uncertainties surrounding tariffs, causing investors to flock towards the precious metal.
news.headline: Gold prices reach record high at $3,110.50/ounce, up 4% as tariffs continue to impact market outlook.

news.summary: Following President Donald Trump's implementation of a controversial tariff plan criticized for its potential stagflationary impact, key figures within the Federal Reserve, such as Mary Daly of the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco, have suggested a potential delay in further rate cuts. Daly expressed her contentment with the current interest rate levels during a moderated discussion at Brigham Young University, where she stated that the central bank had reduced rates by 100 basis points last year, positioning policy in a modestly restrictive stance. Details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: San Fran Fed's Mary Daly urges caution and slow steps as Trump's tariff plan unfolds. Fed may delay rate cuts. Daly comfortable with current interest rate levels after 100 bps cut last year. Reported by Bloomberg.

news.summary: If reciprocal tariffs and an additional 50% tax on Chinese imports are implemented at midnight, the Trump tariffs could reach close to a $1 trillion tax increase. This development has led to a negative impact on the S&P 500, with the index trending downwards.
news.headline: Trump tariffs may hit $1 trillion with reciprocal tariffs & 50% tax on Chinese imports. S&P 500 drops.

news.summary: Archrock's Relative Strength Rating has surpassed 80, indicating strong performance. The company is anticipated to experience significant growth in profits and revenue with the introduction of AI technology.
news.headline: Archrock anticipates strong growth with revenue and profit, reflected in Relative Strength Rating exceeding 80.

news.summary: The recent data shows that the economy grew at a rate of 5.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in the last decade. The stock market also saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 8% in the last month. Consumer spending rose by 4.5%, indicating a strong confidence in the economy. Analysts predict continued growth in the upcoming months, with projections of a 6% increase in GDP and further reductions in the unemployment rate.
news.headline: Impact of Basis Trade Unwind on Bitcoin & cryptocurrencies is being closely watched as it may influence market trends significantly.

news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) based in Newton, Mass. declared a regular cash distribution of $0.35 per common share ($1.40 annually). This distribution will be paid to common shareholders of record as of April 22, 2025, with the payment expected around May 15, 2025. SEVN is a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) specializing in real estate investment.
news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) to pay $0.35 per share ($1.40 annually) dividend to shareholders on April 22, 2025.

news.summary: Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA) has revealed its plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 29, 2025. The release will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for the same day at 11:00 am Eastern Time. During the call, the management team will analyze the company's performance in the first quarter, highlight recent developments, and engage in a question-and-answer segment. Those interested in participating in the call and posing questions can register to obtain the dial-in numbers for the conference.
news.headline: Easterly Government Properties to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025. Conference call at 11am EST. Register for dial-in numbers.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (Nasdaq: ILPT) disclosed its plan to issue a regular quarterly cash distribution on its common shares, amounting to $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually). Shareholders registered with ILPT as of April 22, 2025, will receive this distribution, which is scheduled to be disbursed around May 15, 2025. Specializing in possessing and renting top-tier distribution facilities, ILPT is a real estate investment trust.
news.headline: Industrial Logistics Properties Trust declares quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share ($0.04 per year) for shareholders.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) disclosed a regular quarterly cash distribution of $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually) for its common shareholders. This distribution is slated for shareholders of record by April 22, 2025, with disbursement set around May 15, 2025. OPI, a national Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT), concentrates on acquiring and renting office spaces to tenants with strong credit standings.
news.headline: Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) declares $0.01 per share quarterly dividend ($0.04 yearly), payable on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Radian Group Inc. (NYSE: RDN) shared plans to conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time to review the company's first quarter 2025 results. The results are set to be disclosed after market hours on April 30, 2025. The conference call will be broadcasted live on the company’s website at https://radian.com/who-we-are/for-investors/webcasts or at www.radian.com. The webcast option is listen-only. For those looking to engage, further instructions will be provided at the aforementioned websites.
news.headline: Radian Group Inc. (NYSE: RDN) to hold Q1 conference call on May 1, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time, discussing Q1 results announced after market close on April 30, 2025. Webcast available on company's website.

news.summary: Eversource Energy is set to host a webcast conference call with financial analysts on Friday, May 2, 2025, starting at 9 a.m. EST. During this call, senior management will evaluate the company's financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Interested parties can tune in to the live audio presentation in listen-only mode via the Investors section of the Eversource website. Participants can engage in the question-and-answer session by joining the event through the designated platform.
news.headline: Eversource Energy to discuss Q1 results in webcast on May 2, 2025, 9 am EST. Details available on company website.

news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) revealed a regular quarterly cash distribution for its common shares at $0.01 per share ($0.04 annually). The distribution is slated for payment to SVC's common shareholders recorded by April 22, 2025, with distribution scheduled around May 15, 2025. Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) is a real estate investment trust with a significant investment exceeding $11 billion across two assets.
news.headline: Service Properties Trust (Nasdaq: SVC) declares $0.01 quarterly dividend per share, totaling $0.04 annually, to be paid on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow at a rate of 4.6% in 2022, following a significant economic slowdown due to the ongoing pandemic. The report indicates that the global GDP is projected to reach $95 trillion by the end of the year, with emerging markets leading the recovery. It also forecasts an increase in global trade volume by 7.2%, amounting to $24.6 trillion. However, the report warns of potential risks such as inflation and supply chain disruptions that could impact this growth trajectory. Additionally, it highlights the importance of continued support from policymakers to sustain economic recovery momentum.
news.headline: Company to announce Q1 2025 earnings and host conference call soon.
